lint.description: Lint the app source with ESLint

type-check-test.description: Type-check test files against the test tsconfig

run-ios.description: Build and run the app on an iOS device or simulator

run-android.description: Build and run the app on an Android device or emulator

list-ios-devices.description: List available iOS simulators and connected devices

list-android-devices.description: List connected Android devices and running emulators

clean.description: Remove native build artifacts for iOS and Android. Use make reset for a full workspace wipe.

clear-simulator-app-data.description: Wipe the app's persistent storage from the booted iOS simulator. Requires the app to be installed.

options.command: APP_CONTAINER_DIR=$(xcrun simctl get_app_container booted io.lace.mobilewallet data) && rm -rf "$APP_CONTAINER_DIR"

doctor.description: Run expo doctor and React Native CLI doctor for environment health checks

test.description: Run unit tests and collect coverage
